📦 1. IMPORT LIBRARIES
        pandas, numpy, matplotlib, seaborn, sklearn, xgboost
                    ↓
📂 2. LOAD DATASET
        pd.read_csv()
        check shape, head, info
                    ↓
🔧 3. FIX DATA TYPES
        TotalCharges → string to float
        pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce')
                    ↓
🧹 4. HANDLE MISSING VALUES
        isnull().sum() → find
        dropna()       → remove
                    ↓
🔍 5. CHECK DUPLICATES
        duplicated().sum()
        drop_duplicates() if needed
                    ↓
📊 6. EDA (EXPLORATORY DATA ANALYSIS)
        countplot  → churn distribution
        histplot   → MonthlyCharges distribution
        boxplot    → Churn vs MonthlyCharges
        heatmap    → correlation between columns
                    ↓
🗑️ 7. DROP UNNECESSARY COLUMNS
        customerID → not useful for prediction
                    ↓
🔢 8. LABEL ENCODING
        Yes/No → 1/0
        Male/Female → 1/0
        No phone service → 0
                    ↓
🔢 9. ONE HOT ENCODING
        Contract, InternetService, PaymentMethod
        (3+ genuine categories)
        drop_first=True
                    ↓
⚖️ 10. SCALING
        only non-binary columns
        tenure, MonthlyCharges, TotalCharges
        StandardScaler → mean=0, std=1
                    ↓
✂️ 11. TRAIN TEST SPLIT
        X = features (drop Churn)
        Y = target (Churn)
        80% train, 20% test
        stratify=Y
                    ↓
🤖 12. MODEL BUILDING
        Model 1 → Logistic Regression → Accuracy 80%, Recall 0.57
        Model 2 → Decision Tree       → Accuracy 71%, Recall 0.47
        Model 3 → Random Forest       → Accuracy 78%, Recall 0.49
        Model 4 → XGBoost             → Accuracy 75%, Recall 0.68
                    ↓
📈 13. MODEL EVALUATION
        accuracy_score
        confusion_matrix
        classification_report
                    ↓
🏆 14. MODEL SELECTION
        Recall matters more than Accuracy
        Missing churner = losing customer
        XGBoost → Recall 0.68 → WINNER ✅
                    ↓
🎯 15. FINAL PREDICTION
        new_customer = X_test.iloc[0].values.reshape(1,-1)
        xg.predict(new_customer)
        Actual = No Churn ✅
        Predicted = No Churn ✅
